title: [IOS]Onboarding - Organized page has a continue button
scenario: Onboarding flow shows "Organized" page with Poly Lens location tracking prompt after skipping license/privacy, then navigates to POLY LENS Login screen
steps: On the onboarding flow, accept the License and Privacy terms
Tap Skip on the next screen
Tap the 'Continue' button on the 'Organized' page
expected: The POLY LENS Login screen should appear with both 'Login' and 'Continue as Guest' options.
